SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-22-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:03am

Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, David Kimmel, Roberta Kimmel and Normandy Apartments present through counsel David Foran-sbn 161790. Apartment manager James Bello present as a witness on behalf of Appellants. Respondent, Felicia Pacifica present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi.

10:13am: Court Resumes
